rationale: Ground truth has no substantive reviewer concerns (just a 'thanks' comment and bot spam), so both candidates trivially achieve full recall. Both give accurate, diff-grounded technical assessments and independently converge on the same valid minor point (the == 10 gate excluding a hypothetical sm_110a part mentioned in the PR description). Y goes one step further with a second concrete, plausible nit (stale 'Blackwell-only' wording in pyproject.toml not updated to match the doc/code) and lands on a COMMENT verdict with two actionable file:line items, whereas X's single concern is self-described as low-signal and folded into a plain APPROVE, giving Y a slight edge in actionability.
